Trade.title: Trade
Trade.description: Represents a completed trade for tracking profit and fees.

userId.description: The UID of the user who made the trade.

entryPrice.description: The price at which the trade was opened.

exitPrice.description: The price at which the trade was closed.

profit.description: The realized profit or loss from the trade.

fees.description: The total fees paid for the trade.

UserStats.title: UserStats
UserStats.description: Aggregate trading stats and fee information for a user.

totalProfit.description: Cumulative net profit across all trades.

totalFeesOwed.description: The 20% cut Nebula is owed from the total profit.

totalFeesPaid.description: Total fees the user has already paid to Nebula.

isLocked.description: Whether the user's account is soft-locked due to unpaid fees.

trades.description: Collection of all trades made through Nebula.

user_stats.description: Collection of aggregate stats for each user.
